title: Amtech H1850 9 Piece hollow punch set
features: DURABLE: This hollow punch set is made from strong, heat treated steel for durability
VERSATILE AND EASY TO USE: With knurled bodies for a secure, non-slip grip, they are ideal for making clean holes in gaskets, leather, plastic, rubber, vinyl and other soft materials
SIZES: The set includes sizes: 2.5mm, 3mm, 4mm, 5mm, 6mm, 7mm, 8mm, 9mm and 10mm
COMPACT DESIGN: Suitable for confined or hard-to-reach spaces
DIY & TRADE USE: Reliable choice for both professionals and home projects
description: From the manufacturer 9pc hollow punch set Drop forged and heat treated KnurLED bodies for a secure grip Sizes: 2.5, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9 and 10mm Ideal for making clean holes in gaskets, leather, plastic, rubber, vinyl and other soft materials See More
